languages.text: "Ты прав. Преодоление смерти станет триумфом разума и торжеством бытия, порожденным не волей случая, но волей человека".
"You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."
languages.original_text: "Ты прав. Преодоление смерти станет триумфом разума и торжеством бытия, порожденным не волей случая, но волей человека".

traits.locale_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."
"You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."
"You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

languages.text: "Ihr habt recht. Das Ende des Todes wäre der Triumph des Verstandes und des Lebens, geboren nicht nur aus Zufall, sondern aus dem Willen der Menschheit."
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt recht. Das Ende des Todes wäre der Triumph des Verstandes und des Lebens, geboren nicht nur aus Zufall, sondern aus dem Willen der Menschheit."

languages.text: « Vous avez raison. Vaincre la mort sera le triomphe de la raison et de l'être, qui existe non par chance, mais par la volonté de l'humanité. »
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison. Vaincre la mort sera le triomphe de la raison et de l'être, qui existe non par chance, mais par la volonté de l'humanité. »

languages.text: “你说得对。战胜死亡将是理性的胜利，也是存在本身的胜利。它将不再是偶然的产物，而是人类意志的果实。”
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: “你说得对。战胜死亡将是理性的胜利，也是存在本身的胜利。它将不再是偶然的产物，而是人类意志的果实。”

languages.text: «Tiene razón. Vencer a la muerte es el triunfo de la razón y del ser, fruto no del azar, sino de la voluntad de la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón. Vencer a la muerte es el triunfo de la razón y del ser, fruto no del azar, sino de la voluntad de la Humanidad».

languages.text: 「その通りだ。死を克服することは、理性の勝利であり、存在の勝利となるだろう――偶然の意志によってではなく、人類の意志によって生み出された勝利だ。」
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: 「その通りだ。死を克服することは、理性の勝利であり、存在の勝利となるだろう――偶然の意志によってではなく、人類の意志によって生み出された勝利だ。」

languages.text: "Haklısın. Ölümü yenmek; şansın iradesiyle değil de insanlığın iradesiyle doğan, aklın ve varoluşun zaferi olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "You are right. Vanquishing death will be the triumph of reason and the triumph of being, born not by the will of chance but by the will of humanity."

traits.locale_text: "Haklısın. Ölümü yenmek; şansın iradesiyle değil de insanlığın iradesiyle doğan, aklın ve varoluşun zaferi olacaktır."
